summary: Set 098, final session: shipped the two module-lifecycle set templates and the reusable scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets writer (verdict decisions 5/6). docs/templates/consumer-bootstrap/module-plan-set.spec.md.template (kind: plan; create-or-import the module's project-plan.md) and module-decomposition-set.spec.md.template (kind: decomposition; read the plan + existing sets, author the next batch, prerequisites: pre-linked to the sibling plan set) are the durable, checked-in spec.md sources. scaffoldModuleLifecycleSets(root, module) in src/utils/moduleAuthoring.ts resolves the next two free set numbers (new nextSessionSetNumberFrom in resolveSetNumber.ts, mirroring ai_router.resolve_set.next_session_set_number; new listSessionSetDirNames in fileSystem.ts), renders both templates by loading and {{TOKEN}}-substituting the on-disk files via a new resolveModuleLifecycleTemplatesDir() resolver (mirrors consumerBootstrap.ts's bundle-directory precedent so src/out/dist callers all resolve correctly), writes spec.md only (state files stay the blessed runtime writers' job), and is identity-based skip-existing (a module that already has a scaffolded lifecycle set of a kind keeps it and the writer reuses its slug for the prerequisites cross-link -- never mints a duplicate on a re-run). Fail-loud: an invalid module slug throws before any write; a parse-after-write guard re-parses each freshly-written file with the real parsers and confirms kind/prerequisites landed. Not wired to any UI yet -- Sets 100/101 are the callers. 12 new Layer 2 tests (moduleAuthoring.test.ts: template/render parity against the checked-in files, kind + prerequisites parse-back, fresh-module numbering, numbers-advance-past-existing, two skip-existing variants (re-run and hand-created-dir), refusal-leaves-tree-untouched, declared-planPath propagation; resolveSetNumber.test.ts: 3 new nextSessionSetNumberFrom cases). Suites: pytest 3030 passed/6 skipped (unchanged baseline, no ai_router files touched); extension unit 1534/1534; tsc + esbuild clean; eslint clean (one pre-existing unrelated any warning). Cross-provider phased loop: discovery round 1 ISSUES_FOUND (2 Major, both fan-out calls independent) -- (1) the decomposition template told the AI to hand-author session-state.json for each new child set, contradicting this same session's own "state files are the blessed runtime writers' job" posture; fixed by rewording the template to forbid it and cite the start_session bootstrap contract, pinned with a new assertion; (2) the two render functions embedded template text as hand-synced TS literals with no parity test against the checked-in .template files; fixed by making both render functions load and substitute the real on-disk files (new resolveModuleLifecycleTemplatesDir), with a new parity test proving render output is a substitution of the checked-in files. Remediation-review round 2: VERIFIED, 0 blocking, both fixes accepted. No version bump: single release boundary after Set 101 (this set ships no UI-visible behavior change).
